login.subtitle:
Write reviews and discover
hidden gems from people who share your taste
login.footer: By signing in, you agree to the Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.
tutorial.step1.title: Welcome to K-daejeop! 👋
tutorial.step1.body:
Rate restaurants, cafes & attractions.
Contribute 10 reviews to unlock
recommendations from other users.
tutorial.step2.title: Search for places 🔍
tutorial.step2.body:
Type a restaurant, cafe, or attraction
name in the search bar to get
real-time suggestions.
tutorial.step3.title: Three-tier ratings ⭐
tutorial.step3.body:
⭐ Local gem — Worth a casual revisit
⭐⭐ Recommended — Worth a detour
⭐⭐⭐ Top-tier — Truly unforgettable
tutorial.step4.title: A photo is a must! 📸
tutorial.step4.body:
Please attach at least one photo
with your review.
A short note helps you
remember later.
tutorial.step5.title: 10 reviews → unlock picks 🎉
tutorial.step5.body:
Contribute 10 or more reviews
to unlock recommendations
from other users!
Your reviews earn you rewards.
myReviews.title: My Picks
myReviews.emptyDesc:
Search for a place and leave a review.
Your picks will appear here!
review.title: Write a Review
review.rating1.title: Local gem
review.rating2.title: Recommended
review.rating3.title: Top-tier
review.photoPrompt: Click or drag to attach a photo
review.textPlaceholder: Share your thoughts on taste, ambience, service, etc.
review.dateHint: Scroll to select a date (default: today)
review.err.heicLib: HEIC converter not loaded. Please try again.
review.err.heicFail: HEIC conversion failed. Try exporting as JPG first.
